title: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value model for Super Micro Computer utilizing a discounted cash flow methodology with an estimated cost of equity of 0.1292 and assumed future free cash flow growth.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: Estimated high-growth phase FCF scaling at 0.20.
assumptions.discountRate: Cost of equity based on a beta-adjusted rate of 0.1292.
